title: JPMorgan Activates BTC & ETH As Institutional Collateral
summary:
JPMorgan Activates BTC & ETH As Institutional Collateral

            Via Sentora Research,

JPMorgan has officially bridged the gap between "Digital Gold" and "Wholesale Credit." 

The activation of direct BTC and ETH collateralization allows institutional giants to finally turn their dormant holdings into immediate USD liquidity without selling a single satoshi.

Operating through the Kinexys (formerly Onyx) digital financing platform, the bank now allows institutional clients like hedge funds
summary_ko: JP모간은 비트코인과 이더리움을 기관 담보로 활성화했습니다. 이는 디지털 자산이 기관 투자에서 중요한 역할을 할 수 있음을 시사합니다.

title: Novartis pays $2B to land a startup’s breast cancer drug
summary: Acquiring a unit of privately held Synnovation Therapeutics hands Novartis a prospect that might improve on medicines that, like its own Piqray, target tumors driven to growth by PIK3CA mutations.
summary_ko: Novartis는 유방암 약물 개발을 위해 20억 달러를 투자했습니다.

title: IEA Chief Warns Gulf Flows May Take Six Months To Restore After Biggest-Ever Energy Shock
summary:
IEA Chief Warns Gulf Flows May Take Six Months To Restore After Biggest-Ever Energy Shock

            The head of the International Energy Agency told the Financial Times on Friday that the world is severely underestimating the scale of the Gulf energy shock, and that it may take at least six months to restore disrupted oil and gas flows.

Fatih Birol described the conflict, now in its third week, as "the greatest global energy security threat in history", and said it would take time "to have o
summary_ko: IEA 책임자는 걸프 에너지 공급이 6개월 내에 회복될 수 있을지 우려하고 있습니다. 이는 에너지 시장에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.

title: Rhythm obesity drug wins broader use from FDA
summary: Imcivree’s approval in a type of obesity driven by brain injury could unlock an opportunity Wall Street analysts believe to be worth more than $1 billion.
summary_ko: Rhythm의 비만 치료 약물이 FDA의 승인을 받았습니다.

title: Novo uses FDA voucher to win speedy approval of higher-dose Wegovy
summary: The clearance, issued 54 days after an approval submission, gives Novo another chance to claw back market share from Eli Lilly.
summary_ko: Novo의 고용량 Wegovy가 FDA의 승인을 받았습니다.

title: A conversation with the ‘godfather’ of biotech
summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD," a conversation with biotech "godfather" Stelios Papadapolous live from #STATBreakthrough.
summary_ko: 바이오텍의 대부인 스텔리오스 파파도풀로스와의 대화이다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S. and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: AI를 이용한 의약품 개발 회사 Earendil Labs가 7억 8천만 달러의 자금을 확보했습니다.

title: A biotech VC sees early signs of a turnaround for startups
summary: After a lengthy downturn, renewed optimism is building among young drugmakers and their backers as a new funding wave takes shape, said Santé Ventures’ Omar Khalil.
summary_ko: 바이오테크 벤처 캐피탈은 스타트업의 전환기를 예상합니다. 이는 새로운 자금 조달 물결이 형성되고 있는 것을 의미합니다.

title: Behind the curtain: What Xaira is building after its $1B fundraise
summary: What has Xaira been doing since its $1 billion raise? Xaira COO Jeff Jonker joins "The Top Line" to talk strategy, AI and the company’s long-game vision for drug discovery.
summary_ko: Xaira는 10억 달러의 자금을 조달한 후에 어떤 비전을 가지고 있는지 COO Jeff Jonker가 인터뷰를 통해 밝혔다. Xaira는 인공지능과 약물 발견에 중점을 두고 있다.

title: Verily banks $300M to accelerate AI road map, transitions to independent company
summary: Verily raised a $300 million investment round to accelerate its work in artificial intelligence and precision health as it also moves out from under the corporate umbrella of Alphabet.
summary_ko: Verily는 인공지능과 정밀 건강 분야에서 연구를 가속화하기 위해 3억 달러의 투자를 유치했다. Verily는 알파벳의 자회사에서 독립 회사로 전환했다.

title: Lilly’s three-pronged obesity drug hits goal in large diabetes trial
summary: Retatrutide, a possible advance on GLP-1 drugs like Zepbound, significantly cut blood sugar and body weight in the study, a sign it might be similarly impactful against obesity.
summary_ko: 엘리 릴리의 3중 작용 비만 약물이 대규모 당뇨병 임상시험에서 목표를 달성했습니다. 이는 비만 치료에 효과적인 약물이 될 수 있습니다.

title: AstraZeneca to boost cell therapy capabilities with new China investment
summary: The planned Shanghai facility extends a yearslong push into the field and will support CAR-T therapies AstraZeneca is making for autoimmune disease and cancer.
summary_ko: 아스트라제네카는 중국에 새로운 시설을 투자하여 세포 치료 능력을 강화할 계획입니다. 이는 CAR-T 치료를 위한 시설을 확대하는 것입니다.

title: Novartis pays Synnovation $2B upfront for breast cancer program as rivals circle
summary: Novartis has struck a deal to buy Synnovation Therapeutics’ pan-mutant‑selective PI3Kα inhibitor for $2 billion upfront, securing an asset that could defend its breast cancer franchise from challengers including Eli Lilly.
summary_ko: 노바티스는 Synnovation Therapeutics의 유방암 치료제를 20억 달러의 선불금으로 인수했다. 이 치료제는 노바티스의 유방암 치료제 시장 지위를 유지하는 데 도움이 될 수 있다.

title: Will Chinese Robot Maker Unitree's Shanghai IPO Spark A Humanoid-Investing Bubble
summary:
Will Chinese Robot Maker Unitree's Shanghai IPO Spark A Humanoid-Investing Bubble

            Unitree Robotics, one of China's top robot makers - spanning robo-dogs to humanoid robots - has filed for a Shanghai STAR Board IPO, according to Bloomberg. title: EV Demand Surges Across Asia After Energy Shock Sends Consumers Into Panic Mode
summary:
EV Demand Surges Across Asia After Energy Shock Sends Consumers Into Panic Mode

            One of the biggest takeaways in global energy markets this week is the growing fragmentation. Brent crude in Asia has surged to over $150 a barrel, with demand destruction already emerging, and China and India facing the greatest pressure given their heavy reliance on Gulf crude. Meanwhile, the Trump administration has moved to release barrels from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve to help cap WTI prices b
summary_ko: 아시아에서 전기차 수요가 급증하고 있다. 에너지 쇼크로 인해 소비자들이 패닉 모드로 들어갔다.

title: Qatar Dethroned As 'LNG King' As U.S. Seizes Throne, Reshaping Future Of Gas
summary:
Qatar Dethroned As 'LNG King' As U.S. Seizes Throne, Reshaping Future Of Gas

            Submitted by Criterion Research President, James Bevan, 

The geopolitical calculus underpinning global LNG supply through the early 2030s has shifted materially. Iranian drone strikes on Qatari LNG trains, delays to key expansion projects, and the indefinite closure of the Strait of Hormuz have created a compounding threat to Qatar's LNG position that goes well beyond a construction delay. summary_ko: 미국이 LNG 시장에서 카타르를 추월하여 가스 시장의 미래가 재편되는 중

title: China-rooted AI biotech Earendil Labs raises $787M ahead of possible IPO
summary:
The US-headquartered, China-rooted biotech Earendil Labs said it has raised $787 million in private money, a whopping sum to fund an AI platform that has already produced a pipeline of over 40 drug programs.

 Despite ...
summary_ko: 중국계 인공지능 바이오테크 회사인 이아렌딜 랩스(Earendil Labs)는 IPO를 앞두고 7억 8천만 달러의 자금을 모금했습니다. 이 회사는 이미 40개 이상의 약물 파이프라인을 개발했습니다.

title: STAT+: Sepsis hospitalizations have tripled in Massachusetts. Is it real or a billing game?
summary: In Massachusetts, sepsis cases has more than tripled since 2010. Some blame hospitals' use of AI tools for medical coding and billing.
summary_ko: 매사추세츠에서 패혈증 환자 수가 3배 이상 증가했다. 이는 의료 비용 청구 게임의 결과일 수 있다.

title: Novartis to pay $2B upfront to take next-gen PI3Kα inhibitor from Synnovation
summary:
Novartis will spend $2 billion upfront to buy a more selective PI3Kα inhibitor, intensifying the competition to develop a new wave of breast cancer drugs with fewer side effects.

 The Swiss pharma already markets the ...
summary_ko: 노바티스는 신종 PI3Kα 억제제를 개발하기 위해 20억 달러를 지불하고 Synnovation의 기술을 인수했습니다. 이는 유방암 약물 개발 경쟁을激化시키는 것입니다.

title: Watch: China Claims Cyborg Breakthrough To Build An "Army Of Centaurs"
summary:
Watch: China Claims Cyborg Breakthrough To Build An "Army Of Centaurs"

            Researchers at Southern University of Science and Technology in Shenzhen have unveiled a wearable robotic system that adds a pair of independent mechanical legs and a torso framework to a human wearer, forming a four-legged hybrid to assist with carrying heavy loads across difficult terrain such as stairs, ramps, and uneven ground, according to the South China Morning Post.



Led by Chenglong Fu, the team of sci
summary_ko: 중국은 사이보그 기술을 통해 센타우루스 군대를 구축했다고 주장합니다. 이는 로봇과 인간의 결합을 통해 새로운 형태의 군사 기술을 개발하고 있습니다.
leading_companies: Southern University of Science and Technology

title: Ending the Voicemail Bottleneck: How Voice AI Is Transforming Patient Access
summary:
Beyond simply recording or transcribing messages to lower call volumes, truly autonomous voice AI puts patients in the driver’s seat of their own healthcare. It processes patient requests and information immediately and integrates actionable insights into the EHR, speeding next steps for clinicians and patients. 
The post Ending the Voicemail Bottleneck: How Voice AI Is Transforming Patient Access appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 음성 AI는 환자 접근을 변革하고 있다.

title: First-Ever Look At America's Classified RQ-180 Stealth Drone?
summary:
First-Ever Look At America's Classified RQ-180 Stealth Drone? 

            The world is seemingly at war. With multi-front conflicts raging in Eastern Europe and intensifying in the Middle East, this period of elevated World War III risk has coincided with the emergence of some of America’s most advanced stealth aircraft.

The latest sighting comes from the Greek news website OnLarissa, which reports that a planespotter captured a "mysterious" stealth-bomber-like aircraft operating near Larissa
summary_ko: 미국의 분류된 RQ-180 스텔스 드론에 대한 첫 번째 시각입니다. 이는 미국의 군사 기술을 보여주는 중요한 정보입니다.

title: Lantern Secures $30M to Fuel Growth Across Employers and Health Plans
summary:
Lantern’s $30 million raise was led by Morgan Health, a JPMorganChase business unit focused on employer-sponsored healthcare, as well as Echo Health Ventures, a strategic investment platform that invests on behalf of multiple Blues health plans.
The post Lantern Secures $30M to Fuel Growth Across Employers and Health Plans appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Lantern은 고용주와 건강 보험 계획을 위한 성장 자금으로 3,000만 달러를 확보했다.

title: Inside One VC’s Litmus Test for Investable Healthcare AI Startups
summary:
Katie Jacobs Stanton, founder of Moxxie Ventures, shared some details of how she and her team evaluate healthcare AI startups. She stressed the need for founders with deep industry expertise, differentiated products and realistic distribution strategies.
The post Inside One VC’s Litmus Test for Investable Healthcare AI Startups appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Moxxie Ventures의 창립자는 투자 가능한 의료 AI 스타트업을 평가하는 기준을 공유했다.

title: RBC: Revolution, Xenon, Arrowhead among top takeover targets
summary: As part of a larger review, analyst Leonid Timashev identified 13 companies that could see deal interest as well as more than half a dozen poised to be potential buyers.

title: Why Providence Wants to Sell Its Health Plan
summary:
Providence announced its intent to sell its health plan, exiting the “payvider” model as rising costs and operational complexity weigh on smaller regional insurers. The move reflects a broader trend of health systems refocusing on core care delivery and exploring partnerships instead of running insurance themselves.
The post Why Providence Wants to Sell Its Health Plan appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 프로비던스는 건강 보험 계획을 매각하고자 한다. 이는 비용 증가와 운영 복잡성으로 인한 작은 지역 보험사의 추세를 반영한다.
